title: Transition Condition
description: Records how two assembly systems connect at an interface zone. Tracks which control layers are maintained across the transition and the associated risk level.

transition_id.description: Unique identifier for this transition condition.

interface_zone.description: Interface zone where this transition occurs. References shared/interface_zones.json.

from_assembly_ref.description: Reference to the source assembly system.

to_assembly_ref.description: Reference to the target assembly system.

status.description: Current status of this transition record.

control_layers_maintained.description: Control layers that remain continuous across this transition.

detail_ref.description: Reference to detail drawing or specification section documenting this transition.

risk_level.description: Risk level assigned to this transition.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting this transition design (test reports, mock-ups, inspections).

notes.description: Additional notes about this transition condition.
